identity.name: TaskFlow
principles: Density is Clarity: Use tight grids but distinct borders.
Action over Decoration: Color is for status only.
The 'Living' Grid: Rows should feel tactile, not static.

primary.description: Deep Slate for Light Mode, Off-White for Dark Mode

accent.description: Functional colors only. No decorative gradients.

rules: Use 1px borders to define grid cells.
Text must meet APCA contrast standards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium

cards.style: border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow rounded-sm

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

interactions: Hover: slight lift (-2px) or background highlight
Page Load: Staggered fade-in for grid rows

landing_hero.alt: Abstract geometric structure representing organized tasks

landing.structure: Hero section with 'Tetris' grid layout. Left: Value prop (H1 + CTA). Right: Abstract visual or 3D element. Features section below with 'Bento' grid.

dashboard.structure: Full-width container. Header (Logo, Date Range, User Profile). Main Content: Data Grid.
dashboard.grid_layout: Left Col (30%): Task List. Right Col (70%): Scrollable Day Columns + Progress.

subtask_view.structure: Clean, focused list view. Header with 'Back to Dashboard' (even though it's a new tab, navigation is key).

universal_rules: Ensure Dark Mode is manually tested for contrast.
Do not use gradients for text.
Dashboard grid must be dense but legible (min-height 48px per row).
